author: Xbox YouTube
text:
CONTROL Resonant - Paranatural Manhattan Trailer
The Oldest House has fallen. Reality is bent. Time is warping.

CONTROL Resonant features an open-ended, imaginative sandbox. Experience the largest and richest environment Remedy has ever constructed for a game in this new trailer, showing the visual diversity of paranaturally twisted Manahattan and its enemy factions.

CONTROL Resonant arrives September 24th 2026 to XBOX Series X|S and XBOX on PC. Pre-order now!
 
XBOX Series X|S: https://www.microsoft.com/store/productid/9p092299fsgw

Developed and published by Remedy Entertainment.

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Mafia: The Old Country - Man of Honor Announce Trailer
Join the infamous Ennio Salieri to settle old scores in "Man of Honor," an expansion for Mafia: The Old Country featuring two new story chapters and exclusive Free Ride content.

Coming August 14, 2026 for XBOX Series X|S.

► Wishlist now: https://www.xbox.com/games/store/mafia-the-old-country/9NMK0JGPHHT6

Sicily – Winter, 1905. In the months since his initiation, Enzo Favara has proven himself a reliable soldier of the Torrisi crime family. Now the Don entrusts him and Cesare with a delicate assignment: assist Ennio Salieri, a man of honor recently released from prison and intent on reclaiming what is his.

At Salieri’s side, Enzo is drawn deeper into the volatile underworld of the Valle Dorata, where loyalty is tested, debts are settled, and every move carries weight.

Continue Enzo’s story across two new chapters, featuring fresh environments, weapons, vehicles, and Charms, and exploring a previously unseen period in his early days as a soldato. These chapters can be played as part of the main campaign or accessed directly once you’ve progressed far enough in the story.

In Free Ride, team up with Salieri to earn big by taking on a new set of exclusive jobs and extreme challenges. While exploring the Valle Dorata, discover new collectibles and hidden locations.

This exclusive new content expands the existing Free Ride mode and is only available as part of the Man of Honor expansion. Salieri serves as your point of contact for these jobs, which will test the skills of even the most elite mafiosi.

SUBSCRIBE TO XBOX: https://xbx.lv/2EEjmaR

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
RuneScape: Dragonwilds - Release Date Trailer
Survive The Wilds on September 15th 2026!

On RuneScape's forgotten continent of Ashenfall, dragons have awoken. Gather, build, skill and craft in this co-operative survival adventure. Only by mastering survival and uncovering ancient secrets can you hope to face the ferocious Dragon Queen.

RuneScape: Dragonwilds, the breakout open-world survival crafting game from Jagex: The RuneScape Company is coming to XBOX Series X|S. The release marks the first time in the RuneScape franchise’s 25-year history that a RuneScape title has launched on console!

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced: Official Summer Games Fest Trailer
Featuring “Leave her Johnny” Resynced by Woodkid, a reimagined version of the iconic sea shanty.

Piracy is a dangerous path. Adventure calls, bonds are tested, and the relentless pursuit of freedom and a better life comes at a perilous cost. In Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced, play as Edward Kenway as he carves his legend during the Golden Age of Piracy.

Available July 9, 2026 on XBOX Series X|S and PC: https://ubi.li/O5sQ5

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
gen ATLAS - Official Reveal Trailer
For the first time on XBOX comes a new game from Fumito Ueda, creator of ICO, Shadow of the Colossus, and The Last Guardian. gen ATLAS is a single-player, open-world action-adventure game. 

Without knowing why, you awaken on an abandoned planet. 
Before you lies a vast, silent world. Colossal structures stretch over endless plains, deserted facilities, and an ever-changing sea. The remnants of some grand design litter the planet’s surface.

Wishlist gen ATLAS now: https://www.xbox.com/games/store/gen-atlas/9N844WWQT04G
